title: fix(ui): clarify seed tier dev points rules
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: Demystifying the Seed tier
gist.blurb: We've updated the UI tooltips to clearly explain exactly how to qualify for the Seed tier. No more guessing—just pure, transparent dev points.
gist.summary: Updated the tier explanation tooltip in the UI to explicitly state the requirements for Seed tier dev points, including the 90-day commit constraint and repository rules.
gist.impact: Users can now easily understand exactly what GitHub activity qualifies them for the Seed tier directly from the billing dashboard.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee reading a tiny rulebook or looking at a glowing tooltip next to a little green sprout (representing the Seed tier) in a pot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a glowing holographic tooltip above a small green seedling in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
